full_text:
Empress Dowager He 何太后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Dowager He (何太后)was born in Jurong County (句容縣), Danyang Commandery (丹陽郡). Empress in Wu. Concubine of Sun He. Dowager under reign of Sun Hao. Empress Dowager He was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Empress Dowager He lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
